message.description: Triggered when a message is posted in a channel the app is subscribed to

app_mention.description: Triggered when the app is directly mentioned in a message using @app

channel_created.description: Triggered when a new channel is created in the workspace

channel_archive.description: Triggered when a channel is archived

channel_unarchive.description: Triggered when a previously archived channel is unarchived

channel_rename.description: Triggered when a channel is renamed

channel_deleted.description: Triggered when a channel is deleted from the workspace

reaction_added.description: Triggered when a reaction emoji is added to a message

reaction_removed.description: Triggered when a reaction emoji is removed from a message

member_joined_channel.description: Triggered when a user joins a channel

member_left_channel.description: Triggered when a user leaves a channel

pin_added.description: Triggered when a message is pinned in a channel

pin_removed.description: Triggered when a pinned message is unpinned from a channel

file_created.description: Triggered when a new file is uploaded to the workspace

file_shared.description: Triggered when a file is shared in a channel or conversation

file_deleted.description: Triggered when a file is deleted from the workspace

file_change.description: Triggered when a file is updated or modified

team_join.description: Triggered when a new user joins the workspace

team_rename.description: Triggered when the workspace name is changed

user_change.description: Triggered when a user's profile information is updated

emoji_changed.description: Triggered when a custom emoji is added, removed, or renamed in the workspace

link_shared.description: Triggered when a URL domain registered by the app is shared in a message

app_home_opened.description: Triggered when a user opens the app's Home tab

subteam_created.description: Triggered when a new user group (subteam) is created

subteam_updated.description: Triggered when a user group (subteam) is updated

token.description: Deprecated verification token for the app

team_id.description: The unique identifier of the workspace where the event occurred

api_app_id.description: The unique identifier of the Slack app that received the event

event.description: The inner event payload containing type-specific fields. Includes 'type' (event type string), 'user' (user ID), 'channel' (channel ID), 'ts' (event timestamp), 'text' (message text for message events), and additional fields depending on the event type

type.description: The outer event type, always 'event_callback' for event subscriptions

event_id.description: A unique identifier for this specific event, globally unique across all workspaces

event_time.description: The epoch timestamp in seconds when the event was dispatched

authorizations.description: An array of authorization objects describing the installations that this event is visible to. Each contains enterprise_id, team_id, user_id, and is_bot
